scripts.build:workspaces: npm run build --workspace @indio/contracts && npm run build --workspace @indio/pwa
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @indio/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @indio/pwa
scripts.dev:agent-pwa: concurrently -n indio-agent,pwa -c green,blue "cd agent && PYTHONPATH=. INDIO_PROJECT_ROOT=.. python3 -m uvicorn server:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8900 --reload" "VITE_INDIO_API_URL=http://localhost:8900 npm run dev --workspace @indio/pwa"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
